AI-tools.title: AI tools
AI-tools.content:
AI will not replace designers and developers; they will be replaced by those who use AI. Here’s a list of tools to help you generate, research, develop, and automate the process.
Research & Ideation

The AI Toolbox for Innovators — Test, pivot or generate ideas in minutes with our free AI tools.
User Persona — Create FREE User Personas for Your Product or Service
Value Proposition Canvas — Use our AI-powered tool to create a Value Proposition Canvas for your company based on its description
Predict Human Behavior — AI copilot built on neuroscience
Attention Insight — See how consumers engage with your designs before the launch

Design & Prototyping

Leonardo AI — Leverage generative AI with a unique suite of tools to convey your ideas to the world
Typper — Generate and edit images, texts and functionally codes with the power of Figma and AI
UIzard — Turn product ideas into concepts instantly with GenAI
Galileo AI — Generate interface designs at lightning speed
Taskade — AI Design Templates
Design Tokens Name Generator — Create consistent and scalable design token naming conventions for your design system

Content & Copy

Riter — Generate your next UX Copy, Headings using chatGPT
Ellie — Email Assistant
Jasper — AI copilot for enterprise marketing teams who want better outcomes, not just faster outputs
Writesonic — Unified AI Content Creation & Advanced SEO toolset for Marketers, Agencies, and Enterprises
Copy AI — GTM AI Platform

Image & Video Generation

Luma AI — AI model that makes high quality, realistic videos fast from text and images
Img Upscaler — Upscale and enhance your jpg, png images in batch process
Hyperhuman Rodin — Generate 3D assets
Nightmare — AI Upscaler & Enhancer for HD
Pixelcut — Make your photos amazing using AI (Remove background, Upscale, Eraser)
Gigapixel — Another upscaler
Seedream 3.0 — Generate images

Development & Deployment

Vercel — Vercel provides the developer tools and cloud infrastructure to build, scale, and secure a faster, more personalized web.
Bubble — The visual control you know and love, now supercharged by AI. Bubble turns ideas into fully scalable apps — fast.
Lovable — Idea to app in seconds, with your personal full stack engineer.
Relume.io — Websites designed & built with AI. Sitemaps, Wireframes and Styleguides.
Trae — Trae IDE integrates seamlessly into your workflow, collaborating with you to maximize performance and efficiency.
Zencoder — The most integrated, customizable, and intuitive coding agent.

Research & Development

H2O Danube — A super-tiny, open-weights small language model for offline applications
Google Labs — Google’s latest experimental tools and technology
Storm — STORM is a research prototype for automating the knowledge curation process.
LM Studio — Download and run Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen, Phi on your computer.
Sim Studio — Launch agentic workflows with an open source, user-friendly environment for devs and agents.

Other

Keep It Shot — A Mac app that utilizes AI to automatically provide descriptive names for your files. It also creates an offline, fully private, and extremely fast search index for locating your screenshots using simple keywords.

Related
Design tools, Color and textures, Typography, Design books

Color-and-textures.title: Color and textures
Color-and-textures.content:
There are loads of cool tools for designers on the web, and we all have our go-to tools for working with color and textures. Here are my favs.
Palette Generators

Coolors — Create, save, and collect color palettes.
Color Lisa — Color palettes of famous artists.
Khroma — AI-powered personalized palette generator.
Learn UI — Palettes for charts, maps, and diagrams.
Happy Hues — Palette inspiration with real-world usage examples.

Color Tools & Systems

Tailwind CSS Color Generator — Generate custom color scales.
Material Design — UI color tool from Google.
Color Box — Open-source color system.
Photo Gradient — Create stunning gradients from photos. Grab colors from images and turn them into mesh gradients.
DIC Color Guide — 600 colors, an indispensable guide for designers to select and communicate colors.
Freetone — Contains 1280 colours including Pinkest Pink, Incredibly Kelinish Blue, Black 3.0 and TIFF.

Inspiration & Fun Palettes

Colors LOL — Palettes with fun, descriptive names.
Mymind — Unique color combinations for your projects.

Accessibility & Contrast

Randoma11ly — Random accessible color combinations.
Geenes — Detailed contrast checker.
Stripe’s Accessible Systems — On color contrast and accessibility.

Gradients

CSS Hero — Mesh gradient generator with CSS.
Mesh Gradient — Mesh gradients based on palettes.

Textures

Texture Fabrik — Textures, Patterns, Graphics ‘n’ stuff.
Subtle Patterns — Free tileable textures for your next web project.
Lost and Taken — Free textures for personal and commercial use.
Texture Labs — Free high-resolution textures, brushes, and more.

Related
AI tools, Design tools, Typography, Design books

Design-books.title: Design books
Design-books.content:
Some books about designing or related to designing.
Design Fundamentals & Theory

Design for the Real World: Human Ecology and Social Change (Viktor Papanek)
Goodreads
The Design of Everyday Things (Don Norman)
Goodreads
Grid Systems in Graphic Design (Josef Muller-Brockmann)
Goodreads
Design and Form: The Basic Course at the Bauhaus and Later (Johannes Itten)
Goodreads
Design: History, Theory and Practice of Product Design (Bernhard E. Burdek)
Documen Pub, Amazon
Change by Design (Tim Brown)
IDEO
About Face: The Essentials of Interaction Design (Alan Cooper et al.)
Amazon

UX, User Experience & Research

Contextual Design: Defining Customer-Centred System (Hugh Beyer, Karen Holtzblatt)
ACM Digital Library
Experience Design: Technology for All the Right Reasons (Marc Hassenzahl)
Research Gate
Hidden in Plain Sight (Jan Chipchase)
Research Gate
Sketching User Experiences: Getting the Design Right and the Right Design (Bill Buxton)
Amazon
Sketching User Experiences: The Workbook (Saul Greenberg et al.)
Science Direct

Media, Games & Innovation

Theory of Fun for Game Design (Raph Koster)
Goodreads
Designing Interactions (Bill Moggridge)
Amazon, Mit Press
Designing Media (Bill Moggridge)
Mit Press
Ecosystem of Innovation (Barry Katz)
UCU YouTube, Medium, Nodo
Watches Tell More Than Time (Del Coates)
Archive
By Design: Why There Are No Locks on the Bathroom Doors in the Hotel Louis XIV and Other Object Lessons (Ralph Caplan)
Goodreads
Paradox of Choice (Barry Schwartz)
Wiki, Ted

Design-courses.title: Design courses
Design-courses.content:
No profession can be mastered in a few months. It’s better to make learning a habit. Here’s a useful list for designers at all levels, most of which are free.
Foundations of Design & Graphic Design

Graphic Design Specialization, Coursera
The Language of Design: Form and Meaning, Coursera
Intro to Design Thinking, EdEx
Web Design, Code Academy

UX/UI & User Research

Google UX Design Professional Certificate, Coursera
User Experience: The Beginner’s Guide, IxDF
Introduction to User Experience Principles and Processes, Coursera
UI Design Patterns for Successful Software, IxDF
User Research: Methods and Best Practices, IxDF
Learn UX writing and content design, UX Hub

Animation, 3D & Game Design

Basic 3D Animation using Blender, EdEx
3D Design with Spline, Class Central
Introduction to Game Design, EdEx
TouchDesigner Beginner Course, YouTube

Technology, AI & Modern Tools

AI for Designers, IxDF
Generative AI Explained, Nvidia
Webflow 101, Webflow

Additional Skills

Human-Computer Interaction II: Cognition, Context & Culture, EdEx
TechBridge: English for IT 1, Notecad

Related
AI tools, Design tools, Design books, Color and textures, Typography

Design-tools.title: Design tools
Design-tools.content:
A collection of modern design tools.
Prototyping

Frame0 — Make hand-drawn style wireframes quickly and easily.
Vercel — Vercel provides the developer tools and cloud infrastructure to build, scale, and secure a faster, more personalized web.
Bubble — The visual control you know and love, now supercharged by AI. Bubble turns ideas into fully scalable apps — fast.
Lovable — Idea to app in seconds, with your personal full stack engineer.
Relume.io — Websites designed & built with AI. Sitemaps, Wireframes and Styleguides.
Trae — Trae IDE integrates seamlessly into your workflow, collaborating with you to maximize performance and efficiency.
Zencoder — The most integrated, customizable, and intuitive coding agent.

Motion

Phase — Simple Animation For Product Designers. Easy to Learn - Lottie Animation & Micro-Interactions.
Jitter — From design to animation to handoff, Jitter handles every step of your motion design workflow so that your team can focus on what matters — creating.

Mockups

Maneken — The browser powered mockup editor.
Rotato — Create stunning 3D device mockups and animations for your app or website designs.

Visual Effects

Endless Tools — Meet the all-in-one web tool for quickly crafting striking 3D visuals, animations, and unique effects.

Drawing

Krita — A professional FREE and open source painting program. It is made by artists that want to see affordable art tools for everyone.

Accessibility

Microsoft Inclusive Design — A methodology, born out of digital environments, that enables and draws on the full range of human diversity.

Management

Web Design Project Management Kanban — Project management board to facilitate collaboration and discussion between my team and yours throughout the consulting and developing process.

Portfolios and Inspiration

Diana Lu — Diana Lu is an interaction designer based in LA, this is an exhibition of her works :DDD
Wang Zhihong — WANG ZHIHONG was born in Taipei in 1975. A graphic designer and a member of AGI. He is committed to incorporating typography into his design projects across the cultural and commercial sectors.
Wiby.me — Search engine is building a web of pages as it was in the earlier days of the internet. In addition, Wiby helps vintage computers to continue browsing the web, as pages indexed are more suitable for their performance.

Related
AI tools, Color and textures, Typography

Typography.title: Typography
Typography.content:
A curated collection of my favorite typefaces, font foundries, and typography tools.
Typefaces

Road UI — a new Ukrainian typeface by Andrii Konstantynov, version of the Road UA traffic font. Highly legible and versatile, now adapted for interfaces.
Hvntr Free — favorite free Y2K-style fonts.
Editorial New — a serif font from the legendary Pangram Pangram.
Departure Mono — a contemporary monospaced font with a lo-fi vibe.
Kyiv Metro Fonts — Kyiv metro font collection, free for Ukrainians, donation-based for others.
Geist Sans — A typeface specifically designed for developers and designers. We began by creating a monospace version that prioritized readability and seamlessly integrated into coding environments.

Type Foundries & Libraries

Fontshare — free font collection.
ABCDinamo — independent type foundry with cutting-edge fonts.
205TF — French independent type foundry.
Kyiv Type Foundry — Ukrainian type design studio.
Open Foundry — open-source and free fonts.
Pangram Pangram — global type foundry, contemporary fonts.
The League of Moveable Type — pioneering open-source font community.
Klim Type Foundry — Klim Type Foundry (Klim) was founded by Kris Sowersby in 2005 and is based in Te Whanganui-a-Tara/Wellington, Aotearoa/New Zealand.
Featured Type — A curated showcase of exceptional typefaces, both classic and contemporary.

Etcetera

px to rem Converter — handy tool for converting px to rem.
Atypography Manual — Atypography is an art movement that graphically represents traditional writing systems in an unconventional way, creating an authentic design that remains readable while concealing text signs at first glance.

Related
AI tools, Design tools, Color and textures, Design books

About Me

Hello, my name is Andrii. 🖖 I’m a designer from Kyiv, Ukraine.
I’m interested in design, politics, history, art, games, and stuff like that. I love learning new things, TTRPG, Terry Pratchett and sparkling water.
